summary: Comprehensive backend (15/15 pytest pass) + frontend smoke testing of IMTA MVP. All seed data verified, auth flow with mongosh-injected session works, all 6 protected pages load, FABs visible everywhere, 11-language i18n switch works (KO↔EN verified), petitions show correct signature counts, onboarding modal blocks non-onboarded users.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 783 lines — single-file backend works for MVP but should be split into routers (auth/posts/petitions/reviews/chat/translate) and a seed module before adding more features.
GET /api/posts performs N+1 lookups (author + comment_count per post). For 5 seeded posts this is fine, but switch to aggregation $lookup or batch when posts grow.

POST /api/auth/google/session DOES NOT pop _id before returning user (line 168 calls clean(user) but the inserted dict still references the inserted _id only on existing path — actually fine due to projection {_id:0}). Verified ObjectId leak risk is mitigated everywhere via projection.
Translate endpoint POST /api/translate is unauthenticated and proxies to MyMemory with no rate-limit — small abuse vector if exposed publicly.
Seed signature counts are hardcoded in seed; user-driven sign increments will diverge from realistic ratios but matches PRD intent.
/api/auth/google/session sets cookie with samesite=none + secure — correct for the cross-origin preview environment.
No tests directory existed; created /app/backend/tests/test_imta_backend.py as regression suite for future iterations.
test_credentials: Onboarded user: session_token=test_session_1779718769701, user_id=test_user_1779718769701 (테스트 🇻🇳 강남구 student). Non-onboarded user: session_token=test_notonboard_session_1779718928044 (for onboarding-modal testing). Auth via Cookie header `session_token=...` or `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
seed_data_creation: Created two mongosh test users + sessions. Documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_imta_backend.py covers health, seed validation, auth, posts CRUD+react+save+comment, petition sign idempotency, reviews+like, chat post, notifications, translate. Use BACKEND_URL env or default public URL. Test users + sessions persist in test_database. FAB testids are fab-write-post / fab-chat-lobby (NOT fab-write/fab-chat). Language picker testid: language-picker-btn (header), login-lang-picker (login page); options: lang-{code}.
tested_features: GET /api/posts returns 5 seeded posts with correct authors (응우옌🇻🇳, Nana🇻🇳, 익명🕶️, 리웨이🇨🇳, Maria🇵🇭)
GET /api/petitions returns 5 petitions with exact signature counts [234125, 134425, 89432, 67218, 45891]
GET /api/reviews returns 4 reviews with correct ratings (Sieun 2★, Seohyeon 4★, Seunghwan 1★, 강남성모병원 5★)
Auth: /auth/me 401 unauth; /auth/me 200 with bearer token; /auth/google/session 401 on invalid session_id
Protected endpoint POST /api/posts returns 401 without auth
Create post → GET post → react helpful → save → comment → list comments (all persist)
Petition sign idempotent (second call returns already_signed=true)
Post chat message into ch_global; message visible in list
Notifications auto-seeds 3 for new user; read-all marks all read=true
Translate ko→en via MyMemory returns non-empty translation
Protected route /dashboard redirects to /login without cookie
FAB write + chat present on every protected page
Onboarding modal blocks dashboard for onboarded=false users (nickname/country/district/occupation fields shown)
